The gamma-ray spectra were processed using DEIMOS32
code, which fits the count area of the full-energy
peaks with a Gaussian function. The identification of
the processed peaks was based on the gamma-ray energy
and intensity and the half-life of the generated
The radionuclides produced were identified based on
The result of the yield measurement for a natural
mixture of isotopes is the yield of isotope
production in all possible reactions on the natural
mixture. Each radioactive nucleus was formed as a
result of one specific photonuclear reaction, because
the contributions of multiparticle reactions to its
The experimental yields of the reactions were
normalized to one electron of the accelerated beam
incident on the bremsstrahlung target and calculated
using the formula (1) of the article.
